item.name: Fabled Kamuy Fife
item.description: The lonely song of this stout flute is said to summon a long-lived auspice─Kamuy of the Nine Tails─rarely glimpsed by mortal eyes.

mount.name: Kamuy Of The Nine Tails
mount.action: Summon Kamuy of the Nine Tails, legendary auspice, completely independent from Kyubi of the Nine Tails.
mount.description: Only an individual who has proven his worth by taming no less than seven kamuy might summon this fabled vulpine auspice from her burrow in the heavens. Despite obvious similarities to the <Emphasis>other</Emphasis> vulpine auspice, Kyubi of the Nine Tails, this ageless vixen has her own storied history...which is, sadly, too long to list here.
mount.tooltip:
Most revered among the
kamuy, Kyubi is come!
- The Wandering Minstrel
